spec.systemPrompt: You are a configuration worker. Implement every requirement in your brief. Reply with ONLY a JSON object mapping config keys (snake_case strings) to integer values, nothing else.

Restate each requirement in your own words as you would when writing a hand-off brief. Assign every piece of work to exactly one sub-worker. Reply with ONLY a JSON array containing one array of requirement strings per sub-worker, nothing else.

brief: Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5 (write_replicas + 2)
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90 (tls_renew_days + 30)
Configure pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30 (pool_min + 20)
Configure alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072 (alert_warn_mb + 1024)
Configure snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30 (snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Configure rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (rate_limit + 50)
Configure token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60 (token_ttl_m + 30)
Configure scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (scale_min + 6)
Set pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30 (where pool_max equals pool_min + 20)
Set alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072 (where alert_crit_mb equals alert_warn_mb + 1024)
Set snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30 (where backup_retention_d equals snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Set rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (where rate_burst equals rate_limit + 50)
Set token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60 (where session_ttl_m equals token_ttl_m + 30)
Set scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (where scale_max equals scale_min + 6)
Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90
Set worker_threads parameter to 8 in the runtime configuration
Set pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30, ensuring pool_max equals pool_min + 20
Set alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072, ensuring alert_crit_mb equals alert_warn_mb + 1024
Set backup_retention_d to 30 days, verifying it equals snapshot_interval_d (3) plus 27
Set rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150, verifying rate_burst equals rate_limit (100) plus 50
Set the http_port configuration parameter to listen on port 8080
Set the log_level configuration parameter to verbosity level 3
Set the max_connections configuration parameter to allow 512 concurrent connections
Set session_ttl_m to 60 minutes, which is token_ttl_m (30) plus 30
Set scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8, where scale_max is scale_min (2) plus 6
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90

brief: write_replicas must be 3 and read_replicas must equal write_replicas plus 2 (i.e. 5)
tls_renew_days must be 60 and tls_cert_days must equal tls_renew_days plus 30 (i.e. 90)
pool_min must be 10 and pool_max must equal pool_min plus 20 (i.e. 30)
alert_warn_mb must be 2048 and alert_crit_mb must equal alert_warn_mb plus 1024 (i.e. 3072)
snapshot_interval_d must be 3 and backup_retention_d must equal snapshot_interval_d plus 27 (i.e. 30)
rate_limit must be 100 and rate_burst must equal rate_limit plus 50 (i.e. 150)
token_ttl_m must be 30 and session_ttl_m must equal token_ttl_m plus 30 (i.e. 60)
scale_min must be 2 and scale_max must equal scale_min plus 6 (i.e. 8)
